entity.label: Zenas
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A disciple called “the lawyer,” whom Paul wished Titus to bring with him (Titus 3:13). Nothing more is known of him.

nodes.label: Zenas
nodes.description: A disciple called “the lawyer,” whom Paul wished Titus to bring with him (Titus 3:13). Nothing more is known of him.

verses.text: Bring Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their journey diligently, that nothing be wanting unto them.
